description: R1b control-context vectors. Each vector's per-site `controlContext` was produced by the REAL al-sem L2 walker (indexWorkspace, pre-resolve → computeControlContexts inside indexRoutines, INCLUDING the error-call source-range post-pass). controlContext is ABSENT (key omitted, never null) when al-sem left it undefined. `isHandledEligibility` is a DEBUG side field reproducing routine-indexer.ts:302-318 verbatim (by-var Boolean params ∪ Boolean non-param vars whose lc name == a whole callsite argumentText). Hand-authored lattice invariants were asserted against the live sites before emit. Rust loads this committed file and asserts parity.

vectors.name: a_loop_inside_if
vectors.description: a record-op directly in the `if` body is conditional; the SAME op inside a loop nested in the if is loop-body (max(conditional, loop-body) = loop-body). Top-level op stays top-level.
invariants: top-level FindSet op is top-level
Modify directly in if-body is conditional
Delete inside loop-in-if is loop-body (lattice max), NOT conditional

vectors.name: b_if_case_bodies_conditional
vectors.description: if-then body, else body, and case-branch bodies are all ≥ conditional; the if/case condition leaves (here a record-op in the if-test) execute at AMBIENT (top-level).
invariants: if-condition record-op (IsEmpty) executes at top-level (ambient)
then-body Init is conditional
else-body Modify is conditional
case-branch Insert is conditional
case-else Delete is conditional

vectors.name: c_single_arm_error_guard
vectors.description: single-arm `if Bad then Error()` (no else) is a precondition check: the Error() callsite/op is error-path; the CONTINUATION after it is UNCHANGED (top-level), not narrowed.
invariants: Error() callsite is error-path
error-call op inherits error-path (post-pass)
continuation Modify after single-arm error guard stays top-level
'bad' is NOT IsHandled-eligible (not a callsite arg, not by-var bool param)

vectors.name: d_bare_error_unreachable
vectors.description: a bare top-level `Error()` makes every following same-block site unreachable.
invariants: Modify after bare Error is unreachable
Commit after bare Error is unreachable

vectors.name: d_both_arms_terminate_continuation_unreachable
vectors.description: an `if` whose BOTH arms terminate (then exit, else exit) → the continuation after it is unreachable.
invariants: continuation Modify after both-arms-exit if is unreachable

vectors.name: d_case_terminating_arm_conditional_not_unreachable
vectors.description: a `case` with a terminating arm narrows the continuation to conditional (AL case is not statically exhaustive) — NEVER unreachable.
invariants: continuation Modify after case-with-terminating-arm is conditional, NOT unreachable

vectors.name: e_positive_byvar_param_continuation_guarded
vectors.description: by-var Boolean parameter `IsHandled`; `if IsHandled then exit` guards the CONTINUATION → continuation upgraded conditional → is-handled-guarded.
invariants: 'ishandled' is IsHandled-eligible (by-var Boolean parameter)
continuation Modify after `if IsHandled then exit` is is-handled-guarded

vectors.name: e_negative_not_x_body_guarded
vectors.description: `if not IsHandled then <body>` (negative polarity) guards the THEN-BODY → body upgraded conditional → is-handled-guarded.
invariants: 'ishandled' is IsHandled-eligible (by-var Boolean parameter)
then-body Modify under `if not IsHandled` is is-handled-guarded

vectors.name: e_negative_x_eq_false_body_guarded
vectors.description: `if IsHandled = false then <body>` (negative polarity via `= false`) guards the THEN-BODY → body is-handled-guarded.
invariants: then-body Modify under `if IsHandled = false` is is-handled-guarded

vectors.name: e_published_boolvar_via_callsite_arg
vectors.description: a Boolean LOCAL var (`Handled`) passed as a WHOLE callsite argument (OnBefore(..., Handled)) becomes IsHandled-eligible; `if Handled then exit` guards the continuation.
invariants: 'handled' is published-bool eligible (whole callsite arg, Boolean local)
continuation Modify after `if Handled then exit` is is-handled-guarded

vectors.name: e_negative_ineligible_stays_conditional
vectors.description: `if not flag then <body>` where `flag` is a by-VALUE (not var) Boolean parameter → NOT IsHandled-eligible → body stays plain conditional (no elevation).
invariants: by-value Boolean param 'flag' is NOT IsHandled-eligible
then-body Modify stays conditional (no IsHandled elevation)

vectors.name: f_tryfunction_all_absent
vectors.description: a `[TryFunction]` routine → the walker returns empty maps → NO site carries controlContext (the field is ABSENT, never null).
invariants: there ARE sites (non-vacuous)
NO site carries controlContext (all absent)

vectors.name: g_error_call_inherits_conditional
vectors.description: `if cond then Error()` inside a multi-arm-ish context: the error-call OPERATION (not registered in byOperation) inherits its PAIRED callsite's controlContext via the source-range post-pass. Here the Error() inside a loop body inherits loop-body.
invariants: Error() callsite in loop body is loop-body
error-call op inherits loop-body from the paired callsite (post-pass)
error-call op + Error callsite share the same controlContext (pairing)
